questionHtml: With reference to all the data, suggest a reason for the difference in standardized mean path length for summer and winter.
markschemeHtml:
1. in winter shrews have smaller brains/smaller BCH / converse for summer;
  2. lower/poorer memory/thinking/cognitive skills/learning/intelligence/senses/sense of smell/ability to find food in winter/converse for summer;

meta.title: With reference to all the data, suggest a reason for the difference in standardized mean path length for summer and winter.
breadcrumbLabels: C3.1.4. The brain as a central information integration organ
